languages.text: "Избавьте меня от пустых пререканий. Паскаль, что именно совершил Эоганн?"
"Spare me your petty bickering. Pasqal, what exactly has Eogunn done?"
languages.original_text: "Избавьте меня от пустых пререканий. Паскаль, что именно совершил Эоганн?"

traits.locale_text: "Spare me your petty bickering. Pasqal, what exactly has Eogunn done?"
"Spare me your petty bickering. Pasqal, what exactly has Eogunn done?"
"Spare me your petty bickering. Pasqal, what exactly has Eogunn done?"
"Spare me your petty bickering. Pasqal, what exactly has Eogunn done?"
"Spare me your petty bickering. Pasqal, what exactly has Eogunn done?"
"Spare me your petty bickering. Pasqal, what exactly has Eogunn done?"

languages.text: "Erspart mir Euer jämmerliches Gezanke. Pasqal, was genau hat Eogunn getan?"
languages.original_text: "Spare me your petty bickering. Pasqal, what exactly has Eogunn done?"

traits.locale_text: "Erspart mir Euer jämmerliches Gezanke. Pasqal, was genau hat Eogunn getan?"

languages.text: « Épargnez-moi vos petites chamailleries ridicules. Pasqal, de quoi accusez-vous Eogunn exactement ? »
languages.original_text: "Spare me your petty bickering. Pasqal, what exactly has Eogunn done?"

traits.locale_text: « Épargnez-moi vos petites chamailleries ridicules. Pasqal, de quoi accusez-vous Eogunn exactement ? »

languages.text: “少拿这些琐碎的争吵来烦我。帕斯卡，伊奥贡到底做了什么？”
languages.original_text: "Spare me your petty bickering. Pasqal, what exactly has Eogunn done?"

traits.locale_text: “少拿这些琐碎的争吵来烦我。帕斯卡，伊奥贡到底做了什么？”

languages.text: «Ahórrenme las riñas. Pasqal, ¿qué ha hecho Eogunn exactamente?».
languages.original_text: "Spare me your petty bickering. Pasqal, what exactly has Eogunn done?"

traits.locale_text: «Ahórrenme las riñas. Pasqal, ¿qué ha hecho Eogunn exactamente?».

languages.text: 「些細な口論はやめてくれ。パスカル、エオガンはいったい何をしたんだ？」
languages.original_text: "Spare me your petty bickering. Pasqal, what exactly has Eogunn done?"

traits.locale_text: 「些細な口論はやめてくれ。パスカル、エオガンはいったい何をしたんだ？」

languages.text: "Beni küçük çekişmelerinizden kurtarın. Pasqal, Eogunn tam olarak ne yaptı?"
languages.original_text: "Spare me your petty bickering. Pasqal, what exactly has Eogunn done?"

traits.locale_text: "Beni küçük çekişmelerinizden kurtarın. Pasqal, Eogunn tam olarak ne yaptı?"
